SUBMSN_CLRFCTN_CD_5 
LABEL: 
Submission Clarification Code (1–5) 
DESCRIPTION: Codes indicating that the pharmacist is clarifying the submission. For beneficiaries living in long-term 
care (LTC) facilities, this variable indicates how many days’ supply of the medication
